name: property managers overseeing 5–15 buildings tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 buildings, inefficient tracking of work orders causes delayed maintenance responses. We provide streamlined tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of work orders and preventive maintenance across multiple properties.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking of work orders and preventive maintenance across multiple properties.
